emails.subject: berney
emails.body: I spoke with berney this AM. As you mentioned, I believe he needs some more (a risk premium in his words). I told him that the intent is not to simply be a block-trading spec shop, but we do have a genuine interest in structured customer deals. Also, the size of his group is irrelevant because the marketers will be asked to structure on their own and I will want Berney to have some oversight to ensure quality and consistency, as well as helping out on all of the big deals. Chris Calger 503-464-3735

emails.subject: Re: berney
emails.body: Re: berney I think he'll be done at his current offer, do you want to give him more? I told him he's reporting to you and Milly and he was pleased. Are you listening or video conferencing into this meeting? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld

emails.subject: RE: berney
emails.body: RE: berney actually i think he is out he just put a call into you Chris Calger 503-464-3735 To: Calger, Christopher F.

emails.subject: RE: berney
emails.body: RE: berney What happened? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld

emails.subject: RE: berney
emails.body: no idea i got the impression a little more would do it. He told me his mind is made up. He appreciates the offer, but he wants to do structuring at a company that will have a lot of structuring stuff to do day 1 and will definitely be stable. I told him to see you and have an open mind. Chris Calger 503-464-3735 To: Calger, Christopher F.
